name: pm-restructure-v0
phase: Restructure PM persona agent into focused subagents (v0; PRD-Review + Plan-Review + Research modes)
source_research: git history — see commits on refactor/rename-reviewer-agents-to-roles branch + design conversation in PR description

milestones.name: PRD-Review path migrated to per-dim prompts
milestones.outcome: /prd-review dispatches 9 PM dim prompts (skill-internal in prd-review/prompts/) instead of one PM persona agent. Merge gate (>= baseline finding count) passes.
exit_criteria: 9 PM dim prompt files exist at shield/skills/general/prd-review/prompts/
shield/skills/general/prd-review/dimensions.md replaces personas.md, registering the 9 prompts with persona tags
shield/skills/general/prd-review/SKILL.md dispatches mixed: 9 PM prompts + 4 legacy persona dispatches (architect, agile-coach, dx-engineer, finops-analyst)
Merge gate passes: PM finding count >= 62 across the 4 PRD-review test fixtures; no fixture regresses more than 10%

milestones.name: Plan-Review and Research paths migrated to global subagents
milestones.outcome: PM1-PM10 (Plan-Review) and PM11 (Research-Review) live as global subagents in shield/agents/. research-framer and research-reviewer-narrative authoring subagents replace PM's Research-Framing and Research-Review narrative modes.
exit_criteria: 11 global subagent files exist at shield/agents/ (PM1-PM10 + PM11)
2 authoring subagent files exist at shield/agents/ (research-framer, research-reviewer-narrative)
shield/skills/general/plan-review/ dispatches PM1-PM10 + legacy architect/agile-coach personas
shield/skills/general/research/ dispatches research-framer (Phase 2 framing) + research-reviewer-narrative + PM1-PM10 + PM11 (Phase 2 review)

milestones.name: Legacy PM persona agent retired
milestones.outcome: shield/agents/product-manager.md and shield/skills/general/prd-review/personas.md deleted. All PM work redistributed.
exit_criteria: No stale references in any shield/ or CLAUDE.md file (grep returns zero hits for 'shield:product-manager' as a dispatch target)
Full /prd-review run on each test fixture produces expected output structure

stories.name: Author problem-clarity prompt (dim 1)
stories.description: Author shield/skills/general/prd-review/prompts/problem-clarity.md. Focused prompt for grading PRD §3/§4/§11 against eval points 1a-1d (named persona, baseline data, why-now, first-person evidence). Returns JSON with per-check grade + evidence + gap + suggestion.
tasks: Author shield/skills/general/prd-review/prompts/problem-clarity.md (~40-60 lines): frontmatter (name only), description, inputs, checks-with-severity, exception clause, output_shape JSON spec
Dispatch general-purpose Agent with the new prompt content against standard-with-gaps.md fixture; count dim-1 findings
Verify finding count >= 3 (baseline for dim 1 on standard-with-gaps per prd-review-pm.json)
Refactor prompt if any baseline finding missed; re-test
acceptance_criteria: File exists at shield/skills/general/prd-review/prompts/problem-clarity.md
Dispatching the prompt against standard-with-gaps.md identifies AT LEAST the baseline findings (1b, 1c, 1d gaps with their severities)
Dispatching against well-formed-standard.md identifies the 1d gap (warning) and grades 1a-1c as A
Output is valid JSON matching the dim-block schema
Per-check evidence_quote field contains a verbatim quote from the PRD

stories.name: Author scope-discipline prompt (dim 2)
stories.description: Author prompts/scope-discipline.md grading PRD §2 non-goals + §6 goals against eval points 2a-2c. Includes the N/A exception clause for single-purpose internal tools.
tasks: Read rubric.md dim 2 section + the N/A exception clause
Dispatch against standard-with-gaps.md; verify >= 3 dim-2 findings (2a, 2b, 2c)
Dispatch against internal-tool.md; verify dim 2 grades N/A with reasoning (rubric exception)
acceptance_criteria: File exists at shield/skills/general/prd-review/prompts/scope-discipline.md
Standard-with-gaps fixture: identifies at least 3 dim-2 findings
Internal-tool fixture: dim 2 returns grade 'N/A' with non-empty na_reasoning field
Output is valid JSON matching the dim-block schema

stories.name: Author measurable-success prompt (dim 3)
stories.description: Author prompts/measurable-success.md grading PRD §7 against eval points 3a-3d.
tasks: Dispatch against standard-with-gaps.md; verify >= 3 dim-3 findings (3b, 3c, 3d)
acceptance_criteria: File exists at shield/skills/general/prd-review/prompts/measurable-success.md
Standard-with-gaps fixture: identifies at least 3 dim-3 findings
Output is valid JSON matching the dim-block schema

stories.name: Author raci-and-approvals prompt (dim 7)
stories.description: Author prompts/raci-and-approvals.md grading PRD §1 header + §11 sign-off path against eval points 7a-7d.
tasks: Dispatch against standard-with-gaps.md; verify >= 2 dim-7 findings
acceptance_criteria: File exists at shield/skills/general/prd-review/prompts/raci-and-approvals.md
Standard-with-gaps fixture: identifies at least 2 dim-7 findings (e.g., owner missing, sign-off path missing)
Output is valid JSON matching the dim-block schema

stories.name: Author legal-privacy-compliance prompt (dim 8)
stories.description: Author prompts/legal-privacy-compliance.md grading PRD against eval points 8a-8d. Includes the rubric's N/A treatment for internal-only features (which already exists in baseline as N/A for internal-tool fixture).
tasks: Dispatch against standard-with-gaps.md; verify >= 4 dim-8 findings (8a, 8b, 8c, 8d)
Dispatch against internal-tool.md; verify dim 8 returns N/A
acceptance_criteria: File exists at shield/skills/general/prd-review/prompts/legal-privacy-compliance.md
Standard-with-gaps fixture: identifies at least 4 dim-8 findings
Internal-tool fixture: dim 8 returns N/A with reasoning
Output is valid JSON matching the dim-block schema

stories.name: Author gtm-customer-comms prompt (dim 9)
stories.description: Author prompts/gtm-customer-comms.md grading PRD §16 against eval points 9a-9d.
tasks: Dispatch against standard-with-gaps.md; verify >= 4 dim-9 findings
Dispatch against lean-with-gaps.md; verify dim 9 returns 'informational' grade (lean rubric exemption)
acceptance_criteria: File exists at shield/skills/general/prd-review/prompts/gtm-customer-comms.md
Standard-with-gaps fixture: identifies at least 4 dim-9 findings
Lean fixture: dim 9 returns grade 'informational' (not graded for lean per rubric)
Output is valid JSON matching the dim-block schema

stories.name: Author support-cx-impact prompt (dim 10)
stories.description: Author prompts/support-cx-impact.md grading PRD §17 against eval points 10a-10d.
tasks: Dispatch against standard-with-gaps.md; verify >= 4 dim-10 findings
Dispatch against lean-with-gaps.md; verify dim 10 returns 'informational' (lean exemption)
acceptance_criteria: File exists at shield/skills/general/prd-review/prompts/support-cx-impact.md
Standard-with-gaps fixture: at least 4 dim-10 findings
Lean fixture: dim 10 returns 'informational'
Output is valid JSON matching the dim-block schema

stories.name: Author why-now-cost-of-inaction prompt (dim 11)
stories.description: Author prompts/why-now-cost-of-inaction.md grading PRD against eval points 11a-11c.
tasks: Dispatch against standard-with-gaps.md; verify >= 3 dim-11 findings
acceptance_criteria: File exists at shield/skills/general/prd-review/prompts/why-now-cost-of-inaction.md
Standard-with-gaps fixture: at least 3 dim-11 findings
Output is valid JSON matching the dim-block schema

stories.name: Author risks-and-assumptions prompt (dim 12)
stories.description: Author prompts/risks-and-assumptions.md grading PRD §13/§14 against eval points 12a-12c.
tasks: Dispatch against standard-with-gaps.md; verify >= 3 dim-12 findings
acceptance_criteria: File exists at shield/skills/general/prd-review/prompts/risks-and-assumptions.md
Standard-with-gaps fixture: at least 3 dim-12 findings
Output is valid JSON matching the dim-block schema

stories.name: Rewrite prd-review skill: dimensions.md + SKILL.md + scoring.md
stories.description: Replace personas.md with dimensions.md (registry of 14 dim entries with persona tags). Update SKILL.md to dispatch mixed: 9 PM prompts via general-purpose Agent + 4 legacy persona dispatches (architect, agile-coach, dx-engineer, finops-analyst). Update scoring.md for per-dim envelope shape with backward-compat.
tasks: Update shield/skills/general/prd-review/scoring.md to accept both old and new envelope shapes
Run full /prd-review end-to-end against well-formed-standard.md (manual simulation since live skill needs reload)
acceptance_criteria: dimensions.md exists; lists 14 entries (9 PM dim prompts + 5 legacy persona dispatches)
SKILL.md references dimensions.md as dispatch source
scoring.md accepts both per-persona (old) and per-dim (new) envelopes
Full /prd-review simulation against well-formed-standard produces a complete summary.md-equivalent (manual verification)

stories.name: Run merge gate against PRD-Review path
stories.description: Full merge-gate verification: dispatch all 9 PM dim prompts in parallel against each of the 4 fixtures. Aggregate findings. Compare total to baseline (62). Verify no fixture regresses >10%.
tasks: For each of 4 fixtures: dispatch 9 prompts in parallel; collect dim-level JSON
Compute per-fixture PM finding count (count of evaluation_points where grade not in (A, N/A))
Compare to shield/evals/baselines/prd-review-pm.json: total >= 62 (PASS/FAIL); each fixture not regressed >10% (PASS/FAIL); stretch 1.3x = 81 (informational)
acceptance_criteria: Post-change result file exists at shield/evals/baselines/prd-review-pm-postchange.json
PM total post-change >= 62
No fixture regresses more than 10% from baseline
Stretch noted in result (informational)

stories.name: Author research-framer global subagent
stories.description: Author shield/agents/research-framer.md — focused authoring subagent that produces the 8-section structured framing brief PM currently produces in Research-Framing mode. Returns markdown brief (NOT JSON scorecard).
tasks: Extract Research-Framing content from existing shield/agents/product-manager.md
Author shield/agents/research-framer.md with frontmatter (name: research-framer, description) and body covering PF1-PF8 sections
Dispatch against an ad-hoc research topic; verify all 8 PF sections appear in output
Verify PF7 (must-cite voices) and PF8 (source-type coverage matrix) sections are non-empty
acceptance_criteria: shield/agents/research-framer.md exists
Dispatched against an ad-hoc topic, produces output with all 8 PF sections
Output is markdown (not JSON)
PF7 and PF8 sections contain populated content (not stub placeholders)

stories.name: Author research-reviewer-narrative global subagent
stories.description: Author shield/agents/research-reviewer-narrative.md — focused authoring subagent producing the narrative portion of Research-Review (User Impact Analysis, Scope Recommendation, Prioritization Framework, Stakeholder Summary). The scorecard portion uses PM1-PM11 dim subagents (EPIC-2-S3 et al.).
tasks: Extract Research-Review narrative content from existing shield/agents/product-manager.md
Dispatch against an ad-hoc findings doc; verify all 4 narrative sections present
acceptance_criteria: shield/agents/research-reviewer-narrative.md exists
Dispatched against findings doc, produces all 4 narrative sections
Output is markdown narrative

stories.name: Author PM1-PM10 + PM11 global dim subagents (batched)
stories.description: Author 11 global dim subagent files for Plan-Review and Research-Review grading work. Batched because no Plan-Review test fixtures exist; validation is qualitative against ad-hoc plan + research-findings docs.
tasks: Author shield/agents/scope-discipline-of-plan.md (PM3 — distinct from PRD dim 2 prompt)
Dispatch each against an ad-hoc plan or research-findings doc; verify JSON output
acceptance_criteria: All 11 subagent files exist in shield/agents/
Each file has frontmatter (name, description) + body (inputs, checks, output_shape)
Each dispatched against an ad-hoc doc produces valid JSON conforming to dim-block schema
All 11 grade reasonable severities (not all A, not all F on a fixture with gaps)

stories.name: Update plan-review skill to dispatch PM1-PM10 globals
stories.description: Replace plan-review's PM persona dispatch with parallel dispatch of PM1-PM10 globals. Legacy architect and agile-coach persona dispatches remain as today.
tasks: Add shield/skills/general/plan-review/dimensions.md with PM1-PM10 entries + persona tags + architect/agile-coach legacy entries
Update shield/skills/general/plan-review/personas.md (or replace with dimensions.md per same convention as prd-review)
acceptance_criteria: dimensions.md exists in plan-review/
SKILL.md dispatches PM1-PM10 + architect + agile-coach
End-to-end simulation against an ad-hoc plan produces aggregated output with PM rolled up via tags

stories.name: Update research skill to dispatch new authoring + PM1-PM11 subagents
stories.description: /research Phase 2 framing: dispatch shield:research-framer (replaces PM Research-Framing). Phase 2 review: dispatch shield:research-reviewer-narrative + PM1-PM10 + PM11 (replaces PM Research-Review).
tasks: Simulate Phase 2 against an ad-hoc topic; verify framing + review outputs
acceptance_criteria: SKILL.md references shield:research-framer in framing step
SKILL.md references shield:research-reviewer-narrative + PM1-PM10 + PM11 in review step
Simulation produces a coherent framing brief AND a coherent review (narrative + scorecard)

stories.name: Delete product-manager.md and personas.md
stories.description: Once all PM modes are redistributed and verified working, delete the legacy persona agent and replaced helper files.
tasks: Confirm all 9 PRD-Review prompts + 11 PM1-PM11 global subagents + 2 authoring subagents exist
Confirm all 3 skill orchestrators are updated
Sweep for stale references: grep -r 'shield:product-manager' (should return zero hits as dispatch target)
acceptance_criteria: shield/agents/product-manager.md does not exist
shield/skills/general/prd-review/personas.md does not exist
grep -r 'subagent_type.*product-manager' shield/ returns zero hits
All 3 skill orchestrators have been updated and verified

merge_gate.metric: distinct PM finding count across 4 PRD-review test fixtures
merge_gate.gate_criteria: post-change PM total >= 62 AND no fixture regresses >10%

metadata.design_notes: See docs/shield/pm-restructure-v0-20260521/handoff.md for the architectural rationale and design decisions reached during the planning conversation.
